Go Live: [ More max difficulty achievements. ⬣ ]

message.body: My grasp on reality is contentious so I don't know if what I'm seeing is there.
I think they fucked up when they choose your eternal punishment in hell because you're clearly having too good a time with it.
"Yea, let this dude keep doing hard shit forever except like, and hear me out on this one, he never gets confident and is constantly worried whether he can do it."
I mean, I also have a list of gaming stuff I wanna do but I'm worried I won't get done not because I fear I lack the skill but because I'll probably run out of lifeblood before I get done.
No. It's my gaming skills that need optimizing.
I don't wanna do hard shit, I wanna get good until hard shit is no longer hard.
There is no goal, the journey is the goal and if there is no end I'm good.
I mean, the main thing I probably wont get done with is the larger backlog which has like 600 or so games on it still. My challenge bucket list is a lot shorter but also a lot harder.
Challenge here meaning single segment stuff. Larger composite stuff I'm not into that much.
Yes but I don't yet know how I'll do it.

Also I had a bit of a "oh wow, I was not prepared for that" moment when I found a sleeper T6 platformer in my Steam library the other day. Free game I added like a year ago except it has an omega fucked deathless achievement for no reason.
That one... I'm actually worried abt a little.
I just added it on a random Steam discovery queue. It was free, it was a platformer, I was curious and promptly forgot about it.
And when I say fucked up hard I do mean fucked up hard. Like "SRBR Rainbow Challenge" or harder kind of fucked.
For now I've shelved it for "after TEiN 152" but I'm still worried. It's exhilarating.
Like, imagine all the messed up pixel alignment safety strats that could end up happening.
Jump at this precise angle to make the 1 frame into a 2 frame input.
dw, just a good needle game
Is it really just humanely rng?
as in patterns you cant react to with human reaction times.
like theoretically possible but not humanely.
my enter key is too sensitive
Anyways have you ever though of swapping form daily streaming to once a wekk
My thought is starving people of balloon will cause them to grow more fond
I think viewership here is a secondary goal.
the real goal is to play all the worst games
I mean, the primary one is gaming. Past that, if you just wanted recordings of it you wouldnt need to stream.
balloon gotta prove he's doing it live
@johnbob_78 That game is still being played by people?
I mean i tried to convince him to play amogus with me bakc in the year of our lord 2020 but he blew me off
since then I've been consumed by nothing but pure calcified rage
Many people have started off disliking me for reasons known only to them
Many months later they realize i'm basically harmless if not entertaining
You gotta level up your charisma
Speaking of lists, I saw a bird today.
And nothing to spend it on

@johnbob_78 That's... uhm... over 1000 years... I think he wouldn't survive that.
Because there was too much completion grind
we know a guy who's immortal
balloon probably just gotta use the juice tbh
@predatory_balloon I bet you cant make yourself, and all your viewers imortal
the challenge is give up on this game and play something watchable
